scripts.dev:db:generate: export DATABASE_URL="${DEV_DATABASE_URL:-postgresql://showbook:showbook_dev@localhost:5433/showbook}" && node scripts/guard-not-prod-db.mjs && pnpm --filter @showbook/db drizzle-kit generate
scripts.dev:db:migrate: export DATABASE_URL="${DEV_DATABASE_URL:-postgresql://showbook:showbook_dev@localhost:5433/showbook}" && node scripts/guard-not-prod-db.mjs && pnpm --filter @showbook/db drizzle-kit migrate
scripts.dev:db:create:e2e: docker compose exec -T db sh -c "psql -U showbook -d showbook -tAc \"SELECT 1 FROM pg_database WHERE datname = 'showbook_e2e'\" | grep -q 1 || createdb -U showbook showbook_e2e"
scripts.dev:db:reset:e2e: docker compose exec -T db sh -c "psql -U showbook -d showbook -c 'DROP DATABASE IF EXISTS showbook_e2e WITH (FORCE);' && psql -U showbook -d showbook -c 'CREATE DATABASE showbook_e2e;'"
scripts.dev:db:migrate:e2e: export DATABASE_URL="${E2E_DATABASE_URL:-postgresql://showbook:showbook_dev@localhost:5433/showbook_e2e}" && node scripts/guard-not-prod-db.mjs && pnpm --filter @showbook/db drizzle-kit migrate
scripts.dev:db:prepare:e2e: pnpm dev:db:reset:e2e && pnpm dev:db:migrate:e2e && export DATABASE_URL="${E2E_DATABASE_URL:-postgresql://showbook:showbook_dev@localhost:5433/showbook_e2e}" && node scripts/guard-not-prod-db.mjs && pnpm --filter @showbook/jobs bootstrap-pgboss
scripts.dev:db:studio: export DATABASE_URL="${DEV_DATABASE_URL:-postgresql://showbook:showbook_dev@localhost:5433/showbook}" && node scripts/guard-not-prod-db.mjs && pnpm --filter @showbook/db drizzle-kit studio
scripts.test:integration: pnpm dev:db:prepare:e2e && export DATABASE_URL="${E2E_DATABASE_URL:-postgresql://showbook:showbook_dev@localhost:5433/showbook_e2e}" && node scripts/guard-not-prod-db.mjs && nx run-many -t test:integration --parallel=1
scripts.test:integration:coverage: pnpm dev:db:prepare:e2e && export DATABASE_URL="${E2E_DATABASE_URL:-postgresql://showbook:showbook_dev@localhost:5433/showbook_e2e}" && node scripts/guard-not-prod-db.mjs && nx run-many -t test:integration:coverage --parallel=1
scripts.prod:up: docker compose --env-file .env.prod -f docker-compose.prod.yml pull web && docker compose --env-file .env.prod -f docker-compose.prod.yml up -d
scripts.prod:db:migrate: docker compose --env-file .env.prod -f docker-compose.prod.yml exec web pnpm --filter @showbook/db drizzle-kit migrate
